questions.label: Deal name
questions.description: Pre-filled from ClickUp; PM only confirms. Deal name comes from the deals table — not a Host FAQ data point.

questions.label: Visitor name
questions.description: Dropdown of Arbio team members

questions.label: Distance to city center (min by transport)
Nearest public transport
questions.description: Note: detailed transport list is auto-generated in Hub from Geoapify

questions.label: How to get from airport
questions.description: From Final Info DB; auto-fillable but PM curates

questions.label: How to get from central station
questions.description: From Final Info DB; auto-fillable but PM curates

questions.label: Noise source
questions.description: Only if noise present

questions.label: Location notes
questions.description: Only if notable

questions.label: Neighbourhood narrative (3-5 sentences)
questions.description: Resumable post-visit ~15-30 min

questions.label: Nearby grocery store recommendations
questions.description: From Final Info DB; PM curates on top of Hub auto-fill

questions.label: Nearby restaurant & café recommendations
questions.description: From Final Info DB; PM curates on top of Hub auto-fill

questions.label: Nearby attractions / sightseeing recommendations
questions.description: From Final Info DB; PM curates on top of Hub auto-fill

questions.label: Nearby clubs & bars recommendations
questions.description: From Final Info DB; PM curates on top of Hub auto-fill

questions.label: Nearby street markets recommendations
questions.description: From Final Info DB; PM curates

questions.label: Closest public transport station + walking time
questions.description: Name of nearest station and approximate walking time from the property.

questions.label: Directions from the airport
questions.description: Step-by-step directions for a guest arriving from the airport (line/train, transfers, total time).

questions.label: Directions from the central station
questions.description: Step-by-step directions for a guest arriving from the central train station.

questions.label: Actual parking type if different
questions.description: Only if parking verify = Different

questions.label: Parking access instructions
questions.description: Step-by-step access

questions.label: Nearby parking options
questions.description: Public/paid lots within walking distance; with prices if possible

questions.label: Elevator working today?
questions.description: Verify of elevator presence is covered by fv_building_amenities_verify (Elevator option)

questions.label: Elevator usage instructions
questions.description: Only if non-trivial

questions.label: Building amenities verify
questions.description: validates_host_faq=true (loc_building_amenities); elevator working state captured separately at fv_building_elevator_working

questions.label: Construction site/disruption nearby?
questions.description: Explain if yes

questions.label: Step-free entry to the building?
questions.description: Whether a guest can enter the building without using stairs.

questions.label: Elevator dimensions (W × D × door width)
questions.description: Inside-cab width × depth, plus door clear-width. Measure in cm. Skip if no elevator.

questions.label: Ramps / accessibility aids present?
questions.description: Free text about any ramps, lifts, or accessibility aids the visitor observes.

questions.label: Other accessibility / mobility notes
questions.description: Free text — anything else relevant to mobility-impaired guests (door thresholds, grab bars, etc.).

questions.label: Number of check-in steps
questions.description: Typically 1-3

questions.label: Step name
questions.description: Repeats per check-in step

questions.label: Access point
questions.description: Repeats per step

questions.label: Lock type
questions.description: Repeats per step

questions.label: Smart lock provider
questions.description: Only if Smart Lock

questions.label: Smart lock device ID / serial
questions.description: Per step; only if Smart Lock. Needed for Breezeway/Conduit setup

questions.label: Lock brand / manufacturer
questions.description: Per step; free text

questions.label: Key storage method
questions.description: Only if Physical Key

questions.label: Storage brand
questions.description: Only if Keybox/Locker

questions.label: Default access code
questions.description: SENSITIVE / PII; only if Keypad/Keybox

questions.label: Lock notes (per-step)
questions.description: Only if quirky

questions.label: Overall check-in notes (not per-step)
questions.description: Only if unusual; distinct from per-step lock notes

questions.label: Luggage storage on-site
questions.description: PM collects fresh — luggage-storage question was removed from Host FAQ

questions.label: Trash location on-site
questions.description: PM collects fresh — trash-location question was removed from Host FAQ

questions.label: Fuse box location
questions.description: Often per building, but may be per-unit in older European stock — note location precisely

questions.label: Electricity meter location
questions.description: For Ops cost allocation; PM-observable on-site

questions.label: Facility manager / Hausverwaltung contact
questions.description: Opportunistic — only if encountered

questions.label: Fire exit route from unit
questions.description: Primary route

questions.label: Secondary fire exit available?
questions.description: Explain if yes

questions.label: Fire safety concerns observed (building-level)
questions.description: Per-unit extinguisher/detector gaps are captured at fv_fire_extinguisher_present and fv_smoke_detector_present

questions.label: Fire safety notes
questions.description: Only if concerns flagged

questions.label: Common areas / building facilities — repeater
questions.description: One entry per shared space. Visitor walks the building and documents each common area found.

questions.label: Fuse box location
questions.description: Where the building/unit fuse box is physically located.

questions.label: Fuse box reset instructions
questions.description: How to reset / interact with the fuse box. Visitor documents the steps observed.

questions.label: Electric meter location
questions.description: Where the electric meter is physically located.

questions.label: Electric meter number
questions.description: Serial / meter number visible on the device.

questions.label: Gas meter location
questions.description: Location of the gas meter (if applicable).

questions.label: Gas meter number
questions.description: Serial / meter number on the gas meter.

questions.label: Water meter location
questions.description: Location of the water meter.

questions.label: Water meter number
questions.description: Serial / meter number on the water meter.

questions.label: Utility providers — repeater
questions.description: One entry per utility company. Visitor asks Hausmeister/property manager for emergency contacts (Vattenfall, Stadtwerke, etc.).

questions.label: Maintenance procedures — repeater
questions.description: One entry per staff-facing procedure (e.g. Bathroom ventilation, Fire alarm response, No electricity response). Visitor documents observed steps with photos / video.

questions.label: Cleaning provider name
questions.description: Only if external

questions.label: Can Arbio take over existing cleaning?
Laundry provider name
questions.description: Only if external

questions.label: Nearest laundromat for guests
questions.description: Only if no in-unit washer

questions.label: Extra services offered
questions.description: From Final Info DB. validates_host_faq=true partial overlap with loc_guest_services

questions.label: Booking method per service
questions.description: Per service

questions.label: Service restrictions observed on-site
questions.description: PM observes building rules / posted signs (e.g., no pets, no parties, quiet hours). unit_restrictions is no longer collected in Host FAQ, so this is a fresh collect

questions.label: House rules — repeater
questions.description: 8 standard Arbio rules pre-populated (noise curfew, no unregistered guests, no pets, no parties, no smoking, respect check-in/out, dispose garbage in cans, close windows + turn off appliances before leaving). Visitor confirms + adds property-specific rules.

questions.label: WiFi download speed (Mbps)
questions.description: Speed test takes ~30-60s

questions.label: WiFi upload speed (Mbps)
questions.description: Same test as download

questions.label: Check-in walkthrough video
questions.description: Covers all check-in steps

questions.label: Parking access video
questions.description: Only if parking available

questions.label: Floor plan uploaded?
questions.description: validates_host_faq=true (loc_floor_plans)
questions.pms_target: (audit field — derivable from profile.floorPlan being non-null)

questions.label: Number of balconies
questions.description: May vary per individual unit within a category — capture per unit if they differ

questions.label: Location of unit in building
questions.description: e.g. 'second floor, east wing'. Genuinely per-individual-unit — capture per unit; unit_category is the closest scope we have

questions.label: Floor of unit
questions.description: Genuinely per-individual-unit; in mixed-floor buildings capture per unit even within one category

questions.label: View comments
questions.description: Only if meaningfully different from owner claim

questions.label: Apartment + bathroom door clear widths
questions.description: Narrowest door width (cm) inside the apartment. Critical for wheelchair access.

questions.label: Actual capacity / bed setup if mismatch
questions.description: Only if a verify above = No

questions.label: Capacity comments
questions.description: Only if mismatch

questions.label: Ceiling height (meters)
questions.description: Visual estimate; for curtains

questions.label: Maintenance details
questions.description: Required if maintenance > None

questions.label: Appliances & amenities — repeater section
questions.description: One entry per appliance/amenity. Form starts with up to 13 pre-populated item names (optional — could also start empty): Washing machine, Heating, Air conditioning, Dishwasher, TV / Smart TV, Stove / oven, Coffee machine, Iron + ironing board, Vacuum cleaner, Hairdryer, First-aid kit, Cleaning supplies, plus an 'Other' free row. NO other pre-fill — sub-fields below are blank for visitor to fill. Visitor can remove, edit, or add items. Each entry maps to one row in PMS equipmentAndAmenities[].

questions.label: Item name
questions.description: Name of the appliance/amenity (e.g. 'Washing machine'). Pre-set if the item came from the starter list; editable.

questions.label: Item kind (discriminator)
questions.description: Discriminator: Appliance | Equipment | Amenity. Usually pre-set per starter item (most starter items = Appliance).

questions.label: Brand / manufacturer
questions.description: Free text. Blank unless visitor records it.

questions.label: Location in unit
questions.description: Where the item is (e.g. kitchen, bathroom, hallway closet).

questions.label: Operation notes / how to use
questions.description: Free text or short notes. Goes to instructions[] or notes on PMS side.

questions.label: Availability type
questions.description: How the item is provided to the guest.

questions.label: Operational status
questions.description: Functional check by visitor.

questions.label: Status note
questions.description: Free text about the current status (only if non-Operational, or noteworthy).

questions.label: Video needed? (audit)
questions.description: Internal flag: does ops need to record a how-to-use video for this item? Audit/workflow signal; no PMS field — hub-only.

questions.label: Fire extinguisher last service date visible?
Smoke detector functioning (test)
questions.description: Press test button

questions.label: General apartment photos
questions.description: Working photos, not listing

questions.label: Window photos for measurement attached?
questions.description: Photos for curtain ordering

questions.label: Standard check-out items applicable
questions.description: Generic items live in Arbio Standards template

questions.label: Property-specific check-out steps
questions.description: Skip if none

questions.label: Check-out time
questions.description: Default 10:00

questions.label: Overall readiness for go-live
questions.description: Synthesizes everything observed

questions.label: Blocking issues
questions.description: Required if Conditional/Not ready

questions.label: Blocking issue details
questions.description: Specifics + cost/time estimates

questions.label: Health score (1-10)
questions.description: Gut-feel rating
